other_observers: Brandon Percival, Ric Olson; Brandon Percival and Mark Peterson were the finders on 5/17
description: A medium-sized vireo without wingbars. The bird was olive above and yellow on the throat fading to whitish belly. A dark eyeline and the contrasting pale supercilium made the face more striking than the very similar Warbling Vireo. Bill was dark grayBehaviors: One bird foraged in a willow and another foraged in a Juniperus sp tree. Both birds foraged at low to mid-level heights.Call: none notedPlumage: adult
